title: Bolsius Tapered Candles - Metallic Silver - 4-Pack - 24.5 cm - Decorative Household Candles - Burn Time of 7 Hours - Unscented - Includes Natural Vegan Wax - Without Palm Oil
features: Check out the revamped Essentials collection! The Bolsius smooth dinner candle in the colour Metallic Silver is 24.5 cm tall, with a burn time of 7 hours. Tapered for a trendy look. Crafted with passion for people and the planet, using natural vegan wax and palm oil free. The collection includes elegant candles in a range of sizes and colours, which can be effortlessly combined with each other. A valuable addition for every interior!
Gold is not the only one that shines. This white and silver metallic colour is like sparkling starlight. Add some sparkle to your home!

Since 1870, Bolsius has been making quality products to create cosiness and a warm ambience in your home. We do this with passion, skilled craftsmanship and a love for people and planet. Bolsius inspires, connects and warms people with the magic of candlelight and fragrances that tickle the senses. It's how you can make every moment a special one. For yourself and for everyone around you.
